case_title: MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION VS. COGHLAN'S LTD. ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, LAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Williams of Law Offices of David Williams telephone number 510-847-2356 for Plaintiff Mateel Environmental Justice Foundation.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
